steps.title: Name the transition relationship
steps.content: The first sentence broadly says Srinivasan has worked at JPL. The second sentence gives the particular JPL role she held: data scientist on the Mars 2020 Perseverance rover team. The transition should signal a move from general statement to specific detail.

steps.title: Choose the specifying transition
steps.content: Choice B signals contrast, but the rover role does not oppose the first sentence. Choice C signals the end of a sequence, but no sequence is being listed. Choice D signals concession, but there is no obstacle or reversal. Specifically introduces the precise detail. The answer is A.
